name: Korean Casual Summer Outfit Formula — Sheer Blouse & Wide-Leg Pants
why: The sheer white blouse over a fitted tank with wide-leg light pants is so dreamy and feminine. It's romantic without being precious. The sheer fabric keeps it cool and adds visual interest. This is the kind of outfit that would look amazing in photos at the Spanish Arch or down by the Claddagh. The soft pastel palette is very me.
